subject: Provide gcc on installer host when not present
commit_message:
Provide gcc on installer host when not present

Issue-ID: MULTICLOUD-900
Signed-off-by: Konrad Bańka <k.banka@samsung.com>
Change-Id: Ibacec8deafa5f1fd9ded5822236db730fedddc82

Patch Set 1:

where we want to compile go apps? This is deployment.

Patch Set 1:

> where we want to compile go apps? This is deployment.

During KUD setup, it's possible (via setting KUD_PLUGIN_ENABLED flag) to build k8splugin from source code and deploy on installer node via docker container.
Building k8splugin is done on host and uses "go" for this, but "go" further requires "gcc" for compilation.

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> > where we want to compile go apps? This is deployment.
> 
> During KUD setup, it's possible (via setting KUD_PLUGIN_ENABLED flag) to build k8splugin from source code and deploy on installer node via docker container.
> Building k8splugin is done on host and uses "go" for this, but "go" further requires "gcc" for compilation.

now I remember. But how it's possible we did not encountered this earlier? Is this vagrant based or allInOne?

Patch Set 1:

> > Patch Set 1:
 > >
 > > > where we want to compile go apps? This is deployment.
 > >
 > > During KUD setup, it's possible (via setting KUD_PLUGIN_ENABLED
 > flag) to build k8splugin from source code and deploy on installer
 > node via docker container.
 > > Building k8splugin is done on host and uses "go" for this, but
 > "go" further requires "gcc" for compilation.
 > 
 > now I remember. But how it's possible we did not encountered this
 > earlier? Is this vagrant based or allInOne?

Well, it looks that most of images for single-host deployment had it already installed so the problem wasn't encountered. According to latest changes (KUD rebased from u16.04 to u18.04), I'm now using u18.04 (internal) image for KUD deployments and it looks like gcc was missing here. I guess vagrant ubuntu image has it already preinstalled as nobody claimed this issue.
Change has been successfully merged by Ritu Sood
